name: print-upscale-studio
description: Hybrid local and cloud AI image enhancement toolkit for print workflows, with Packaging Safe protection masks for packaging and photo comparison.
author: ngoctunguyenle@gmail.com

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:smoke
scripts.dist:win: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
